# FrogTalk

> FrogTalk is a privacy-first, end-to-end encrypted chat, calling, and social platform. It combines Signal-style E2E messaging with Discord-style channels plus a lightweight social feed with Reels and stories. Open-source, no ads, no tracking, no data sale.

FrogTalk runs on the web, Android, and desktop (Linux AppImage). It supports direct messages, group channels, voice and video calls, voice messages, stories, Reels, a public social feed ("Frog Social"), shared music listening, and live two-way bridges to Discord and Telegram. The same account works across all clients.

## Core links

- [Home](https://frogtalk.xyz/): Landing page with feature overview.
- [Web app](https://frogtalk.xyz/app): The full chat client (login required).
- [Android download](https://frogtalk.xyz/download/android): Native Android client.
- [Desktop AppImage](https://frogtalk.xyz/static/FrogTalk-1.4.1.AppImage): Linux desktop build.
- [Sitemap](https://frogtalk.xyz/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable site index.
- [robots.txt](https://frogtalk.xyz/robots.txt): Crawler policy.

## Documentation

- [REST API docs](https://frogtalk.xyz/docs/api): Public HTTP API for bots, integrations, and self-hosted bridges.
- [Federation / node docs](https://frogtalk.xyz/docs/node): Running a FrogTalk node and federating with the network.

## Features

- **End-to-end encrypted DMs**: Messages between users are encrypted on-device.
- **Voice & video calls**: 1-to-1 and group calls in browser and on Android.
- **Channels & directory**: Public and private rooms with a searchable directory.
- **Frog Social**: Public posts, Reels, stories, reactions, replies, polls.
- **Music together**: Synchronized shared listening sessions.
- **Discord & Telegram bridges**: Two-way message bridging with both networks.
- **Disappearing messages**: Per-chat expiry timers.
- **Cross-platform**: Web, Android, Linux desktop. Same account everywhere.

## Privacy

- E2E encryption for direct messages.
- No advertising, no third-party trackers, no data sale.
- Minimal account requirements (no phone number).
- Open-source codebase.

## Brand

- Name: FrogTalk
- Domain: frogtalk.xyz
- Mascot/theme: green frog
- One-line: "Secure encrypted chat, calls, and social — privacy by default."
